name: property managers handling 10-20 rental units/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10-20 rental units/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent reconciliation instead of manual spreadsheets and email communication.
problem_solved: Manual reconciliation of monthly rent can lead to errors and delays.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual reconciliation of monthly rent can lead to errors and delays.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 10-20 rental units/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent reconciliation instead of manual spreadsheets and email communication.

one_liner: For property managers processing 10-20 rental units/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent reconciliation instead of manual spreadsheets and email communication.
